competency_groups.title: Reading Comprehension through Unseen Passage
competency_groups.description: Assessment of conceptual understanding, decoding, analyzing, inferring, interpreting and vocabulary skills through discursive and case-based factual passages.

competency_groups.title: Writing Skills and Grammar
competency_groups.description: Assessment of creative expression, reasoning, justifying, illustrating, appropriate style and tone, using appropriate format and fluency, alongside applying conventions with accuracy.

competency_groups.title: Language through Literature
competency_groups.description: Assessment of recalling, reasoning, appreciating, applying literary conventions, illustrating and justifying. Extracting relevant information, identifying central themes, understanding the writer's message and writing fluently.
competency_groups.chapter_name: Reference to the Context & Short & Long Answer Questions

competency_groups.title: Listening and Speaking Skills (Internal Assessment)
competency_groups.description: Integrated component of language skills focusing on interactive competence, fluency, pronunciation, and grammatical accuracy in speaking and listening contexts.
